title: nbdkit bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.38.5-12]
- server: Fix .zero fallback path
  resolves: RHEL-101635

[1.38.5-11]
- Add support for VDDK 9.0.0.0
  resolves: RHEL-99466

[1.38.5-10]
- CVE-2025-47711 denial of service attack by client sending maximum size block
  status
- CVE-2025-47712 denial of service attack by client sending large unaligned
  size block status
  resolves: RHEL-95814

[1.38.5-9]
- vddk: Improve statistics
  related: RHEL-94823

[1.38.5-8]
- Log filename, offset and count in nbdkit-file-plugin error messages
  resolves: RHEL-95363

[1.38.5-7]
- vddk: Pre-cache the extents for readonly connections
  resolves: RHEL-94823

[1.38.5-6]
- Add extra system call checking and debugging to nbdkit-file-plugin
  resolves: RHEL-85510
- Allow nbdkit-file-plugin to zero and trim block devices
  resolves: RHEL-89353

[1.38.5-2]
- vddk: Avoid reading partial chunk beyond the end of the disk
  resolves: RHEL-71694

[1.38.5-1]
- Rebase to 1.38.5 (along stable branch)

[1.38.3-1]
- Rebase to 1.38.3 (along stable branch)
- Send the last error to the NBD client
  resolves: RHEL-50664
full_text:
[1.38.5-12]
- server: Fix .zero fallback path
  resolves: RHEL-101635

[1.38.5-11]
- Add support for VDDK 9.0.0.0
  resolves: RHEL-99466

[1.38.5-10]
- CVE-2025-47711 denial of service attack by client sending maximum size block
  status
- CVE-2025-47712 denial of service attack by client sending large unaligned
  size block status
  resolves: RHEL-95814

[1.38.5-9]
- vddk: Improve statistics
  related: RHEL-94823

[1.38.5-8]
- Log filename, offset and count in nbdkit-file-plugin error messages
  resolves: RHEL-95363

[1.38.5-7]
- vddk: Pre-cache the extents for readonly connections
  resolves: RHEL-94823

[1.38.5-6]
- Add extra system call checking and debugging to nbdkit-file-plugin
  resolves: RHEL-85510
- Allow nbdkit-file-plugin to zero and trim block devices
  resolves: RHEL-89353

[1.38.5-2]
- vddk: Avoid reading partial chunk beyond the end of the disk
  resolves: RHEL-71694

[1.38.5-1]
- Rebase to 1.38.5 (along stable branch)

[1.38.3-1]
- Rebase to 1.38.3 (along stable branch)
- Send the last error to the NBD client
  resolves: RHEL-50664

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20673-0.html
